targets.rawSql:
SELECT countDistinct(market_id) AS `Marchés météo surveillés`
FROM prediction_core.strategy_signals
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(market_id, '${market:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (positionCaseInsensitive(strategy_id, 'weather') > 0 OR positionCaseInsensitive(raw, 'weather') > 0 OR positionCaseInsensitive(raw, 'city') > 0)
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(toTimeZone(observed_at, 'Europe/Paris')) BETWEEN 14 AND 22)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(toTimeZone(observed_at, 'Europe/Paris')) BETWEEN 14 AND 22))
  )

SELECT count() AS `Alertes intraday`
FROM prediction_core.debug_decisions
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(market_id, '${market:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (positionCaseInsensitive(raw, 'intraday') > 0 OR positionCaseInsensitive(raw, 'alert') > 0 OR positionCaseInsensitive(raw, 'momentum') > 0)

SELECT dateDiff('minute', max(observed_at), now()) AS `Fraîcheur source météo minutes`
FROM prediction_core.debug_decisions
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(market_id, '${market:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (source_ok OR positionCaseInsensitive(raw, 'source') > 0)

SELECT count() AS `Résolutions météo`
FROM prediction_core.resolution_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(market_id, '${market:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (positionCaseInsensitive(source, 'weather') > 0 OR positionCaseInsensitive(source, 'noaa') > 0 OR positionCaseInsensitive(source, 'wunderground') > 0 OR positionCaseInsensitive(source, 'hko') > 0 OR positionCaseInsensitive(raw, 'official') > 0)

SELECT
  observed_at AS time,
  market_id AS `Marché`,
  anyLast(probability) AS `Probabilité modèle`,
  anyLast(market_price) AS `Prix marché`,
  anyLast(edge) AS `Edge`
FROM prediction_core.strategy_signals
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(market_id, '${market:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (positionCaseInsensitive(strategy_id, 'weather') > 0 OR positionCaseInsensitive(raw, 'weather') > 0 OR positionCaseInsensitive(raw, 'city') > 0)
GROUP BY time, market_id
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  observed_at AS `Observation (Paris)`,
  market_id AS `Marché`,
  JSONExtractString(raw, 'city') AS `Ville`,
  JSONExtractString(raw, 'date') AS `Date météo`,
  JSONExtractString(raw, 'source') AS `Source météo`,
  probability AS `Probabilité modèle`,
  market_price AS `Prix marché`,
  edge AS `Edge`,
  if(live_order_allowed, 'LIVE_INTERDIT_A_VERIFIER', 'PAPER_ONLY') AS `Mode sécurité`
FROM prediction_core.strategy_signals
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(market_id, '${market:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (positionCaseInsensitive(strategy_id, 'weather') > 0 OR positionCaseInsensitive(raw, 'weather') > 0 OR positionCaseInsensitive(raw, 'city') > 0)
ORDER BY observed_at DESC
LIMIT 200

panels.title: Marchés météo par ville / date / source

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  observed_at AS `Observation (Paris)`,
  market_id AS `Marché`,
  decision_status AS `Action opérateur`,
  skip_reason AS `Blocage`,
  capped_spend_usdc AS `Risk cap USDC`,
  source_ok AS `Source OK`,
  orderbook_ok AS `Carnet OK`,
  risk_ok AS `Risque OK`,
  paper_only AS `Paper only`,
  live_order_allowed AS `Live autorisé`
FROM prediction_core.profile_decisions
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(market_id, '${market:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (positionCaseInsensitive(strategy_id, 'weather') > 0 OR positionCaseInsensitive(raw, 'weather') > 0 OR positionCaseInsensitive(raw, 'risk_caps') > 0)
ORDER BY observed_at DESC
LIMIT 100

SELECT
  observed_at AS `Observation (Paris)`,
  market_id AS `Marché`,
  side AS `Côté`,
  price AS `Prix paper`,
  size AS `Taille`,
  spend_usdc AS `Spend USDC`,
  status AS `Statut paper`,
  paper_only AS `Paper only`,
  live_order_allowed AS `Live autorisé`
FROM prediction_core.paper_orders
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(market_id, '${market:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (positionCaseInsensitive(strategy_id, 'weather') > 0 OR positionCaseInsensitive(raw, 'weather') > 0 OR positionCaseInsensitive(raw, 'source_latency_tier') > 0)
ORDER BY observed_at DESC
LIMIT 100

SELECT
  observed_at AS `Observation (Paris)`,
  resolved_at AS `Résolu à`,
  market_id AS `Marché`,
  source AS `Source settlement`,
  outcome AS `Outcome`,
  outcome_price AS `Prix outcome`,
  closed AS `Closed Polymarket`,
  JSONExtractString(raw, 'provider') AS `Provider officiel`,
  JSONExtractString(raw, 'station_code') AS `Station`,
  JSONExtractString(raw, 'observed_value') AS `Valeur observée`
FROM prediction_core.resolution_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(market_id, '${market:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (positionCaseInsensitive(source, 'weather') > 0 OR positionCaseInsensitive(source, 'noaa') > 0 OR positionCaseInsensitive(source, 'wunderground') > 0 OR positionCaseInsensitive(source, 'hko') > 0 OR positionCaseInsensitive(raw, 'official') > 0)
ORDER BY observed_at DESC
LIMIT 100
